title: 私、みんなと走ってます！

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I-it's finally time... The interclass long-distance
relay race!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It seems the director will be spectating the races
today. Do your best to represent our class, Spe.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass, King, Sei, Tsuru, and of course I will be cheering you on with all our hearts and souls!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! Being the anchor is a huge
responsibility, but I won't let you guys down!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No need to fear! Yours truly is the head of our
class's cheerleading squad, and we'll be sure to
rouse you relay runners to victory!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I'll be cheering you on from the stands too!
Having a late surger like you as the anchor
practically guarantees a win!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'll support you from my dreams as I take a little
afternoon nap...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Nuh-uh! You've gotta cheer for her along with the
rest of us, Sei!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once the relay race finally kicks off, Special
Week's team charges ahead to take a healthy
lead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the other teams refuse to give up, and things
are neck-and-neck by the time the anchors are
getting ready for their turn!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oooh... It's almost time for me to go.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I have to win... I have to! I'm the anchor, so I can't
mess this up! I won't let everyone's hard work go
to waste!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now just a minute, you silly dingus. Did you really
think I would let just one person be the bearer of
this race's outcome?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
King's right. Release all that pent-up tension.
You'll be able to run more freely if you relax.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
As your rivals, we know better than anyone how
strong you are. Now go out there and run with
your head up high, Spe.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yo también! Your skills have earned my mightiest
seal of approval!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Come on, everyone. Let's send off our anchor
with a good cheer! Ready, and...

text_block_list.name: Spe's Classmates
text_block_list.text: You've got this, Speee!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...!
Thank you, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(I'm not alone. I'm carrying everyone's
expectations. They're all running alongside me in
spirit!)

text_block_list.name: Spe's Classmates
text_block_list.text: Gooooo! You can do it, Speee!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(I want to keep running together with
everyone—now and forever!)

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Splendid! That was a spectacular win! Special
Week's running seems to have inspired her
competition quite a bit too!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! By the way, Trainer
<username>! What do you
think her strength stems from?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I agree! Mutual competition and
encouragement from rivals are great boons to an
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she and the others will continue to
encounter even more rivals in the future.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
And as they continue to chase their dreams,
they'll gain even more experience and become
stronger yet.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, watching this race has given me a glimpse
into the golden future that awaits them! Fantastic!
Truly fantastic!
choice_data_list: It'll be exciting to see what the future holds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa and I pray that the other
Umamusume at Tracen will continue to work hard
so they can run like Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Agreed! Maintaining a stout, unwavering spirit
may sound simple, but in truth, it is a very
difficult task!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
The world of racing is as much about competing
against one's rivals as it is about contending
against oneself.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
In the face of the perpetual battles that must be
endured, I've seen many a student lose heart and
give up on their racing dreams...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Yet despite the challenge, Special Week has the
strength to remain committed to her goals. I'm
sure that determination will carry her to the very
end.
choice_data_list: It'll be exciting to see what the future holds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa and I pray that the other
Umamusume at Tracen will continue to work hard
so they can run like Special Week.
